aquaSettings.pageDescription: Manage core Aqua module behavior from a single screen.

form.title: Aqua Settings
form.description: Manage transfer and project behavior from a single screen.

fields.partialTransferOccupiedCageMode: Partial Transfer Rule For Occupied Cage

requireFullTransfer.true: Transfers must move all fish from the source cage without leaving a remainder.

partialTransferOccupiedCageMode.0: If the target cage is occupied, partial transfer is blocked.
partialTransferOccupiedCageMode.1: If the target cage is occupied, partial transfer is allowed only when it contains the same batch.
partialTransferOccupiedCageMode.2: Partial transfer is allowed even when the target cage is occupied.
partialTransferOccupiedCageMode.disabledByFullTransfer: This rule is currently inactive because full transfer is required.

feedCostFallbackStrategy.0: If feeding cannot be matched to an actual goods receipt cost, weighted average cost is used.
feedCostFallbackStrategy.1: If feeding cannot be matched to an actual goods receipt cost, FIFO costing is used.
feedCostFallbackStrategy.2: If feeding cannot be matched to an actual goods receipt cost, the last purchase price is used.

projectDetailReport.readGuideDescription: Cards show project totals, expandable rows show cage-level daily movements.
projectDetailReport.readGuideCurrentFish: Current Fish: live fish after mortality and shipments are deducted from initial stock.
projectDetailReport.readGuideShipment: Shipment Qty: left is fish count, right is biomass in grams.

rawKpiReport.description: Shows operational and biological raw KPI fields by project and cage.
rawKpiReport.loadFailed: Raw KPI data could not be loaded.
rawKpiReport.tableDescription: Biological performance and operational outputs are listed per active cage.
rawKpiReport.dictionaryDescription: You can see what each field means, which source data it uses, and how it is calculated here.

descriptions.survivalPct: Shows how much of the initially stocked fish is still alive. It is derived from initial stocking records and the current live population after mortality and movement effects are reflected.
descriptions.mortalityPct: Shows cumulative mortality against initial stocking. Total mortality count is divided by the initial fish count.
descriptions.fcr: Feed Conversion Ratio. Total feed entered in the system is divided by net biomass gain. Lower values generally indicate better feeding efficiency.
descriptions.adgGramPerDay: Average Daily Gain. The difference between current and initial average weight is divided by days in sea, giving daily growth per fish in grams.
descriptions.sgrPctPerDay: Specific Growth Rate. Uses logarithmic weight change per day and is more suitable for comparing groups with different weight levels.
descriptions.densityPct: A temporary capacity utilization metric for cage density. Since there is no full volume or m3 model yet, current biomass is compared against configured cage biomass capacity.
descriptions.forecastBiomassKg30d: A simple 30 day biomass projection using current live population and estimated daily biomass gain.

formulas.survivalPct: Survival % = current live fish / initial fish * 100
formulas.adgGramPerDay: ADG = (current average gram - initial average gram) / days in sea
formulas.densityPct: Density % = current biomass / cage biomass capacity * 100
formulas.forecastBiomassKg30d: Forecast biomass = current biomass + daily biomass gain * {{forecastDays}} days

businessKpiReport.description: Shows harvest readiness, forecast confidence, and assumption-based revenue/margin fields by project and cage.
businessKpiReport.loadFailed: Business KPI data could not be loaded.
businessKpiReport.tableDescription: Decision-support metrics and assumption-based economics are listed per active cage.
businessKpiReport.dictionaryDescription: These fields are derived from current operational data plus business rules. When priced goods receipts and shipment lines exist, the system uses them; missing price history is never replaced with fabricated values.
businessKpiReport.assumptionDescription: Feed cost is derived from goods receipt lines and sales price from shipment lines. When price history is missing, only the uncovered portion stays at 0 and the system does not invent commercial values.

descriptions.estimatedFeedCost: Calculated as total feed multiplied by feed cost per kg derived from priced goods receipts. If a stock has no price history, only that uncovered portion remains at 0.
descriptions.feedCostPerCurrentKg: Calculated feed cost distributed across current live biomass. This shows the current feed cost burden per live kg.
descriptions.projectedHarvestBiomassKg: Business layer reuses the raw growth and biomass trend. It shows expected harvest biomass at the end of the forecast window if current growth continues.
descriptions.projectedRevenue: Projected harvest biomass multiplied by the sales price per kg derived from shipment history. If there is no shipment price history yet, revenue stays conservative.
descriptions.projectedGrossMargin: Projected revenue minus feed cost. The result is only as strong as the real price coverage available in the system.
descriptions.daysToTarget: Current average gram is compared with target harvest gram and divided by ADG. If ADG is missing or zero, the field cannot be computed reliably.
descriptions.harvestReadinessPct: This is a decision-support score, not a direct financial metric. Weight progress, survival, and FCR quality are blended into a 0-100 readiness value.
descriptions.forecastConfidencePct: Shows how trustworthy the forecast is. The score increases when weighings are recent, feeding activity is consistent, and the data set is more mature.

formulas.estimatedFeedCost: Feed cost = total feed (kg) * feed cost per kg. The cost is derived from goods receipt history and the selected fallback method.
formulas.feedCostPerCurrentKg: Feed cost per live kg = estimated feed cost / current biomass (kg)
formulas.projectedHarvestBiomassKg: Projected harvest biomass = current biomass + daily biomass gain * {{forecastDays}} days
formulas.projectedRevenue: Projected revenue = projected harvest biomass * sale price. The sales price is derived from shipment history.
formulas.projectedGrossMargin: Projected gross margin = projected revenue - feed cost. The result is bounded by the real price history available.
formulas.daysToTarget: Days left = (target gram {{targetHarvestGram}} - current gram) / ADG
formulas.harvestReadinessPct: Readiness % = weight progress score * 0.55 + survival * 0.25 + FCR score * 0.20
formulas.forecastConfidencePct: Forecast confidence = weighing recency + feeding continuity + data maturity score
